hero.title: Digital solutions that move business forward.
hero.subtitle: Websites, apps, and automation. Built smart, designed for growth.

basicInfo.title: Basic info
basicInfo.item2: We have a team of experienced developers and programmers
basicInfo.item4: After launch: we take care of the website and can continue to improve it

collaboration.title: How our cooperation works
collaboration.subtitle: Cooperation is simple and transparent. From the first message to the final handover, you know what is happening and what will follow.

step1.title: 1. Selection and contact
step1.desc: You choose a plan, or write directly to us about what you need.

step2.title: 2. Brief agreement
step2.desc: We connect via call, chat, or video call and fine-tune the assignment.

step3.title: 3. Starting work
step3.desc: After receiving a 25% deposit, we start working on the project.

step4.title: 4. Continuous updates
step4.desc: We regularly send updates so you have an overview.

step5.title: 5. Adjustments during realization
step5.desc: Changes are possible according to the selected plan or agreement.

step6.title: 6. Handover and claims
step6.desc: You can claim the final work with a justified statement, and we will go through everything together.

order.title: What you can order
order.text: Everything we offer in one place:

services.websites: Custom websites and e-shops focused on speed, UX, and conversions.
services.hosting: Reliable hosting, domains, security, and long-term maintenance.
services.webApps: Modern web apps, internal systems, and client portals.
services.courses: Courses and consulting to help your team level up faster.
services.other: Automation, integrations, and other digital solutions tailored to your goals.
services.moreDesc: Need something extra? Contact us and we will design the right solution for you.

finalCta.title: Let's talk about your project
finalCta.text: Send us a few lines about what you are planning. We will reply within 24 hours with a practical next-step proposal.
finalCta.cardText: It only takes a moment. Share your goal and budget, and we will design the right path.
